extension.description: Language support for Verilog and SystemVerilog powered by the Vide language server.
configuration.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the language server.
configuration.server.command.description: Override command used to launch the Vide language server. Leave empty to use the bundled binary.
configuration.server.args.description: Arguments passed before any additional arguments when a custom command is provided.
configuration.server.cwd.description: Working directory for the Vide language server process. Defaults to the first workspace folder.
configuration.server.additionalArgs.desc: Additional arguments appended when launching the Vide language server.
configuration.qihe.command.description: Command used to invoke Qihe. It must be available in the environment PATH seen by VS Code.
configuration.qihe.autoConfigureArgsFrom: Automatically add Qihe compile mode and forwarded slang options from the Vide project manifest. Disable this to provide those options manually through Qihe compile and run arguments.
configuration.qihe.compileArgs.descripti: Arguments inserted after `qihe compile`. Use this for compile mode selection or forwarded `slang` options such as `--mode sv -- -I include`.
configuration.qihe.runArgs.description: Arguments inserted after `qihe run` when the Qihe analysis button is used.
configuration.files.excludeDirs.markdown: Workspace-relative directories ignored by Vide. Globs are not supported; add matching patterns to VS Code `files.watcherExclude` if needed.
configuration.files.watcher.enum.client: Use VS Code watched-file notifications when supported.
configuration.files.watcher.description: Controls how Vide watches project files.
configuration.workspace.auto.reload.desc: Automatically refresh project information when project manifests change.
configuration.scope.visibility.descripti: Controls whether symbols inside scopes, except ports, are visible outside those scopes.
configuration.formatter.provider.enum.ve: Use an external verible-verilog-format executable. Supports Format Document and Format Selection.
configuration.formatter.path.description: Path to verible-verilog-format when vide.formatter.provider is verible. Leave empty to find it on PATH.
configuration.formatter.args.description: Arguments passed to verible-verilog-format when vide.formatter.provider is verible.
configuration.formatting.on.enter.descri: Enable formatting behavior when pressing Enter.
configuration.formatting.indent.width.de: Fallback indentation width used when editor formatting options are unavailable.
configuration.inlayHints.port.connection: Show inlay hints for port connections.
configuration.inlayHints.parameter.assig: Show inlay hints for parameter assignments.
configuration.inlayHints.end.structure.e: Show inlay hints for ending structure names.
configuration.lens.instantiations.enable: Show code lenses for module instantiations.
configuration.semantic.tokens.port.clk.r: Highlight clock and reset ports with dedicated semantic token modifiers.
configuration.semantic.tokens.port.input: Highlight input and output ports with dedicated semantic token modifiers.
configuration.diagnostics.update.markdow: Controls when diagnostics are refreshed. `onSave` avoids running expensive diagnostics on every edit; `onType` refreshes diagnostics after document changes.
configuration.diagnostics.slang.warnings: slang warning options, equivalent to command-line warning names such as `default`, `everything`, `none`, `error`, `no-<name>`, or `error=<name>`.
configuration.diagnostics.slang.rules.ma: Rules that filter or override diagnostic severities. Supported selectors: `code:<subsystem>:<code>`, `option:<name>`, `group:<name>`, `source:parse`, `source:semantic`.
configuration.diagnostics.slang.rules.se: Severity to apply when this rule matches. Use ignore to hide the diagnostic.
configuration.diagnostics.slang.rules.fo: Reserved for future support for overriding in-source diagnostic pragmas.
configuration.signature.help.params.only: Show signature help for parameters only.
command.showOutput.title: Vide: Show Language Server Output
command.restartServer.title: Vide: Restart Language Server
command.showServerVersion.title: Vide: Show Server Version
command.reloadWorkspace.title: Vide: Reload Project Configuration
command.showStatus.title: Vide: Show Status
command.runQiheAnalysis.title: Vide: Run Qihe Analysis
command.profileDiagnostics.title: Vide: Profile Diagnostics
